name: Client Operating Model Phase 0 Authority Readiness
outcome_goal: Produce the authority readiness implementation packet for the Object Truth client operating model and Virtual Lab program.
anti_requirements: Do not invent schemas or tools that are not backed by current repo or roadmap authority.
Do not recommend static HTTP or script-owned authority for domain behavior.

jobs.label: phase_00_authority_readiness_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_00_authority_readiness/PLAN.md. Treat roadmap_item.object.truth.trust.toolbelt.authority as the parent authority. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 0: Authority Readiness and Boundary Gates. Include: Verdict, authority boundaries, existing code/docs to inspect first, missing DB/CQRS operations, readiness query contract, privacy boundary, provider/runtime gates, no-go conditions, implementation steps, tests, validation commands, rollback/stop boundary, and how later waves should consume this output. Do not edit code.
